# QA Plan: Sprint 4 - Management Interface Beta + Base System MVP

---

## Source Inputs

- Sprint plan and 2026-04-27 revalidation: `production/sprints/sprint-004.md`
- UI evidence checklist: `production/qa/evidence/sprint-004-management-base-evidence.md`
- Relevant tests: `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd`, `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd`, `tests/integration/save/battle_save_manager_integration_test.gd`

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Gate | Required evidence | Current evidence / action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| MGMT-001 Character management UI | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Roster, party order, detail panel interaction coverage and screenshot | `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd`; manual screenshot queue `MAN-002` |
| MGMT-002 Equipment management UI | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Equipment list, equipped state, swap behavior | `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd`; equipment screen implementation files present |
| MGMT-003 Management tab integration | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Tab switching without data loss | `src/ui/management/character_tab_bar.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/battle_hud_test.gd`; `character_management_test.gd` |
| MGMT-004 Management save integration | Integration | BLOCKING | Party/equipment/management state persists after save/load | `tests/integration/save/battle_save_manager_integration_test.gd` |
| MGMT-005 Base entry UI | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Main menu and settlement route into base | `src/ui/menu/main_menu.gd`; `src/ui/combat/battle_arena.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` |
| BASE-001 Base hub tabs | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Training/market/management tab routing | `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` |
| BASE-002 Training ground MVP | UI + Logic | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Skill proficiency rendering and training interaction | `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd`; `src/ui/base/training_ground.gd` |
| BASE-003 Market MVP | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Buy/sell price visibility, inventory/gold updates | `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` |
| Sprint-004 end-to-end | Integration | BLOCKING | Main menu -> base -> management -> battle settlement -> base route | GUT runner plus packaged smoke |

## Blocking Automated Plan

- Run Godot parse: `GodotExe --headless --check-only project.godot`
- Run GUT scene runner: `GodotExe --headless res://tests/test_runner.tscn`
- Run packaged smoke: `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke`

## Manual / Advisory Plan

- Use `production/qa/evidence/sprint-004-management-base-evidence.md` as the screenshot checklist, but treat its old "PENDING - sprint implementation not yet complete" line as stale relative to the sprint revalidation table.
- Human visual/flow evidence is centralized as `MAN-002`; it does not block Sprint-004 automation closure.

## Acceptance Risks

- The evidence file status is stale and should be cleaned when `MAN-002` is executed.
- UI screenshots still matter before public release because management and base are player-facing dense screens.
- Packaged smoke currently exercises the base/management route indirectly; any Sprint-006 base/equipment changes should add a stronger path-specific smoke.

## Next Steps

- Keep automated regression focused on `base_hub_test.gd`, `character_management_test.gd`, and `battle_save_manager_integration_test.gd`.
- When Sprint-006 adds Action Points or enhancement UI, extend this plan rather than weakening Sprint-004's current acceptance.
